woodenware.header: All woodenware is handcrafted in our Michigan shop. Custom dimensions available upon inquiry.

honey.header: Raw, unfiltered honey straight from our apiary. Seasonal availability applies.

candles.header: 100% pure beeswax candles, hand-poured in small batches.

products.name: Deep Hive Body
products.description: Commercial grade pine hive body. Built with precision box joints for maximum durability. Ideal for overwintering in northern climates.

products.name: Raw Wildflower Honey
products.description: Pure, unprocessed wildflower honey. Harvested late summer for a robust, complex flavor profile profile.

images.alt: 1lb Classic glass jar of golden honey

products.name: Hand-Dipped Taper Candles
products.description: Solid natural beeswax taper candles. Naturally completely dripless and smoke-free with a mild honey scent.

images.alt: Pair of golden beeswax taper candles
